_comment: Signature validation is ON by default (secure): with no AuthToken set, the webhook returns HTTP 500 (fail-closed) until you set Voxa:Telephony:Twilio:AuthToken from the Twilio console. For local tunnel dev (ngrok), use the 'Local' launch profile instead — it turns validation off because a tunnel rewrites the host so the signed URL won't match. See README.md.

Agent.Instructions: You are a friendly voice assistant on a phone call. Keep responses brief and natural.
